name: Western Union
description_short: Western Union at 1653 Basswood Blvd, Saginaw, TX 76131 is open 8:00 AM – 8:00 PM daily. Call +1 682-316-6386.
description_long: This Western Union location functions as a local agent for the Western Union money transfer network. Typical services at branded agent locations include sending and receiving domestic and international wire transfers, purchasing money orders, and making bill payments. Specific services, hours, and fees vary by location — contact the store directly using the phone number above for current availability.
pros: Auto loan rates as low as 5.49% APR for new vehicles with online application option
Kasasa Cash Back Checking offering 3% cash back on debit card purchases up to $400 per cycle
Multiple branch locations in Oklahoma with drive-through and on-site ATM access
Certificate of deposit rates up to 3.46% APY available
Federally insured credit union (NCUA) providing member deposit protection
Community engagement through financial education resources and local events
Online banking and digital service options available for members
cons: Limited geographic availability—only serves Oklahoma communities; membership requires affiliation with the field of membership
Promotional rates advertised are subject to credit approval and individual qualification; actual rates may be higher
Money market account rates are relatively low at 1.20% APY compared to online banks
Credit union membership eligibility restrictions apply; not open to all consumers
Boat loan rates at 7.64% APR are higher than auto loan rates, limiting competitiveness for certain products
best_for: Oklahoma residents seeking competitive auto loans with local branch service
Credit union members eligible for membership who want cash-back checking rewards
Consumers prioritizing relationship banking with personalized service over online-only institutions
Local community members who value financial institutions with community involvement
diagnosis: Western Sun Federal Credit Union is best for Oklahoma-based consumers who qualify for membership and prefer traditional branch banking with competitive auto lending rates. The main caveat is that it operates as a regional credit union with membership eligibility requirements, limited geographic reach, and advertised rates require credit approval; consumers outside Oklahoma or unable to meet membership criteria should explore other options.
services: New and used auto loans (5.49% APR)
Checking accounts with Kasasa Cash Back rewards
meta_title: Western Sun — Credit Union in Broken Arrow, OK | CreditDoc
meta_description: Western Sun — NCUA-insured credit union in Broken Arrow, OK. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
